channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Ice Spice Jokes That Her McDonald’s Fight ‘Wouldn’t Happen at Wendy’s’
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to the latest entertainment update. You might have seen it all over social media - a viral video showing rapper Ice Spice in an altercation at a McDonald's in Hollywood, California. Let's dive into what happened."
[Short music transition]
Host: "According to reports, the 26-year-old 'Deli' rapper was at the fast food chain with a friend when another woman approached and tried to strike up a conversation. Things escalated quickly, with the woman reportedly slapping Ice Spice, leading to a brief scuffle that spilled outside before bystanders stepped in."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Ice Spice took to social media to poke fun at the incident, posting the security footage on X and captioning it, 'This wouldn’t happen at Wendy’s.' She also teased an unreleased song, which can be heard playing over the clip. And, fun fact, she was actually in LA to shoot a commercial for Wendy's."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Ice Spice's attorney, Bradford Cohen, has released a statement saying they'll be exploring all avenues to hold the perpetrators responsible for their actions. The LAPD has been notified, and they're looking into possible criminal and civil charges. Cohen also mentioned that the individuals involved seemed to be trying to set Ice Spice up to 'go viral' - but instead, they might be facing mugshots."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's the latest on the Ice Spice incident. You can check out her post on X and see the security footage for yourself. We'll keep you updated on any further developments. Thanks for tuning in."
